zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Sabh Kavanagh於1440年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼高萊安時，她的父親Donald Reagh Kavanaugh44歲，母親Catherine O'Nolan30歲。她於1461年與James Butler在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼高萊安結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1508年在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼聖 卡尼斯享年68歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Sabh Kavanagh于1440年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼高萊安时，她的父亲Donald Reagh Kavanaugh44岁，母亲Catherine O'Nolan30岁。她于1461年与James Butler在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼高萊安结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1508年在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼聖 卡尼斯享年68岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼。

nameMeanings.name: Kavanagh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Aileen, Brendan, Cathal, Conor, Eamon, Keelin, Liam, Michael Sean, Niall, Ronan, Sean Patrick.

Irish: from Caomhánach, an adjectival epithet meaning ‘belonging to (Saint) Caomhán’, whose personal name means ‘little beautiful one’. Etymologically, the first part of the name is the same as that in Kevin .

History: The first known bearer of the epithet was Domhnall Caomhánach (Donal Kavanagh, died in 1175), the son of Diarmait Mac Murchadha (Dermot McMurrough), king of Leinster in the 12th century. Despite being killed at an early age, Domhnall Caomhánach gave his name to a large and important family in Irish history.

variants.name: Kinsella
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Ciaran, Donal, Finbar, Fintan.

Irish (Wexford and Carlow): Anglicized form of Gaelic Cinnsealach, or occasionally Ó Cinnsealaigh ‘descendant of Cinnsealach’, an adjectival personal name meaning ‘proud, masterful’ or ‘chief warrior’. Cinnsealach can also indicate a member of the older population grouping called Uí Chinnsealaigh; compare the origin of Kavanagh .

variants.name: Kevin
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Caoimhín ‘descendant of Caoimhín’ (the personal name Kevin), a name derived from Caémgein ‘comely birth’ although now regarded as a diminutive of Gaelic caomh ‘comely, beloved’. Compare Kavanagh .

variants.name: Cavanaugh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brennan, Aileen, Dermod, Donal, Patrick Sean.
Irish: variant of   Kavanagh  .

variants.name: Cavanah
meanings: with stress on the first syllable, this is a shortened Anglicized form of Mac Caomhánach, see Kavanagh .

alternatively, with stress on -van-, this is a shortened form of McCavana, from Mac an Mhanaigh, ‘son of the monk’ (from manach ‘monk’). This was a Mayo surname, also Anglicized by translation as Monk and Monks .
Irish:

variants.name: Cavender
meanings: English: most probably a nickname from an Anglo-Norman French equivalent of French chavender ‘chub’ (the fish).
English (of Irish origin): Anglicized form of Kavanagh (and its variants, including Cavenagh) or Cavanna . Compare Cavinder .

History: Hugh Cavenagh (died c. 1709) came from Bristol in England to Westmoreland County, VA, in 1658 as an indentured servant for a five-year period to a Mr. Wills. His descendants spell their name mainly Cavender and Cavinder.

variants.name: Kaveney
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Géibheannaigh or Mac Géibheannaigh, ‘descendant or son of Géibheannach’, a personal name based on géibheannach meaning ‘bound, or captive one’. There may have been some confusion between this name and Kavanagh .

variants.name: Cavanagh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brennan, Fergus.
Irish: variant of   Kavanagh  .

variants.name: Kavanaugh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Oonagh.
Irish: variant of   Kavanagh  .

nameMeanings.name: Sabh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘Morning’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Sabh Kavanagh was born in 1440, in Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland, her father, Donald Reagh Kavanaugh, was 44 and her mother, Catherine O'Nolan, was 30. She married James Butler in 1461, in Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1508, in St. Canice, County Kilkenny, Ireland, at the age of 68, and was buried in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Sabh Kavanagh est née en 1440, à Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande, son père, Donald Reagh Kavanaugh, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Catherine O'Nolan, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé James Butler en 1461, à Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1508, à St. Canice, County Kilkenny, Irlande, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Sabh Kavanagh 1440 in Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Donald Reagh Kavanaugh 44 und ihre Mutter Catherine O'Nolan 30. Sie hat 1461 in Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland James Butler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1508 im Alter von 68 Jahren in St. Canice, County Kilkenny, Irland und wurde in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Sabh Kavanagh è nata il nel 1440 nel Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, sua padre, Donald Reagh Kavanaugh, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Catherine O'Nolan, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato James Butler nel 1461, nel Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1508, nel St. Canice, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Sabh Kavanaghが1440年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーゴウランで生まれた時，父Donald Reagh Kavanaughは44歳，母Catherine O'Nolanは30歳であった。1461年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーゴウランでJames Butlerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1508年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニースト. カニスで68歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Sabh Kavanagh(이)가 1440년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이 가란에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Donald Reagh Kavanaugh(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine O'Nolan(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1461년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이 가란에서 James Butler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1508년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 스트. 캔이스에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Sabh Kavanagh nasceu em 1440, em Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, seu pai, Donald Reagh Kavanaugh, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Catherine O'Nolan, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com James Butler em 1461, em Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1508, em St. Canice, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Sabh Kavanagh родилась в 1440 г. в местности гоуран, килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Donald Reagh Kavanaugh было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine O'Nolan, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Butler в 1461 г. в местности гоуран, килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1508 г. в местности ст. канаис, коунти килкенни, Ирландия в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Sabh Kavanagh nació en 1440, en Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, su papá, Donald Reagh Kavanaugh, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Catherine O'Nolan, tenía 30 años. Se casó con James Butler en 1461, en Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1508, en St. Canice, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.
